images.title: Chronosmith's Timepeice.png
images.description: Magic item: This pendant contains a miniature clock, its face protected by a transparent crystal. The hands move, but not in tune with the actual passage of time. Instead, they seem to dance erratically, yet somehow purposefully.
images.alt: Magic item: This pendant contains a miniature clock, its face protected by a transparent crystal. The hands move, but not in tune with the actual passage of time. Instead, they seem to dance erratically, yet somehow purposefully.
